translations.en: a tall man with muscles looking like huge snakes.
translations.zh: 一位高大男子，肌肉如巨蟒般盤繞。

translations.en: "Speak," he growls at you, his voice as rough and cold as stone.
translations.zh: 「說。」他低吼，聲音如石頭般粗礪冰冷。

translations.en: "Are you taking a @census?" His powerful gaze is fixed on you.
translations.zh: 「汝是在做@人口調查？」他銳利的目光鎖定汝。

translations.en: "Yes, you know, counting people, taking down names..."
translations.zh: 「就是那種清點人口、記錄姓名的差事……」

translations.en: "That name is given to friends so that they may feel they are close to me."
translations.zh: 「那個名字是給朋友用的，讓他們覺得與我親近。」

translations.en: "Since I have none, refrain from its use."
translations.zh: 「既然我沒有朋友，就別用那個名字。」

translations.en: "That is a concern of the town, not mine."
translations.zh: 「那是鎮上的事，與我無關。」

translations.en: "He was not fortunate. It is written that it is better to be fortunate than skilled."
translations.zh: 「他命不好。古言有云，走運勝過有能耐。」

translations.en: "He, I'm sure, would agree." His face betrays a slight grin.
translations.zh: 「他一定同意。」他臉上閃過一絲淡淡的微笑。

translations.en: "All men have enemies. A @debt needed to be settled."
translations.zh: 「人人皆有敵手。一筆@恩怨需要了結。」

translations.en: "He hadn't the strength to settle it, so someone decided to take the initiative."
translations.zh: 「他沒有能力了結，於是有人便主動出手了。」

translations.en: He pulls out a knife and begins to pick at his nails.
translations.zh: 他取出一把刀，開始剔著指甲。

translations.en: "Surely you don't buy the fable of the @gargoyle."
translations.zh: 「汝想必不會信那@魔像族的鬼話。」

translations.en: "There wouldn't be enough left to bury if this were the case."
translations.zh: 「若真是如此，連埋葬的遺體都不會剩下。」

translations.en: "This was no monster who settled the debt, it was the work of man's hands."
translations.zh: 「了結此恩怨的不是怪物，而是人手所為。」

translations.en: He brings the knife to his teeth and delicately works it between them.
translations.zh: 他把刀移到牙齒間，細細剔著。

translations.en: "Have you ever seen one?"
translations.zh: 「汝可曾親眼見過魔像族？」

translations.en: "If you had you would not believe the fairy tales "being told by that incompetent mayor."
translations.zh: 「若汝見過，便不會相信那個無能市長所說的童話。」

translations.en: He grabs the knife and holds it aloft. "See this blade?"
translations.zh: 他抓起刀高舉起來。「瞧這把刀？」

translations.en: "Their fangs are twice as long and thrice as sharp."
translations.zh: 「魔像族的獠牙是這把刀的兩倍長，三倍利。」

translations.en: "He is a fool. The perfect man for his job."
translations.zh: 「他是個傻瓜，正好適任此職。」

translations.en: "I don't know him."
translations.zh: 「我不認識他。」

translations.en: "Too kind for his own good."
translations.zh: 「好心過了頭。」

translations.en: "An annoying little man. Makes good wine though."
translations.zh: 「惱人的小個子，但葡萄酒釀得不錯。」

translations.en: "She is kind to me, and yet I believe this is genuine."
translations.zh: 「她對我很好，而且我相信這是出於真心。」

translations.en: "Perhaps the wisest of us all."
translations.zh: 「或許是我等之中最睿智的人。」

translations.en: "He is one to be respected. I have seen him fight, firsthand."
translations.zh: 「他值得敬重。我曾親眼目睹他作戰。」

translations.en: "He is a mighty warrior, as well as a just opponent."
translations.zh: 「他是一位強悍的武士，亦是光明磊落的對手。」

translations.en: He resumes cleaning his nails with his knife.
translations.zh: 他繼續用刀剔著指甲。

translations.en: He ignores the question and you think it wise not to ask again.
translations.zh: 他對此置若罔聞，汝覺得最好不要再問。

translator_notes: 090 Michael: 昔蒙丹爪牙，冷酷孤傲。對昆頓謀殺案有不同看法（非魔像族所為）。
